title: v4.8.1 — Quality of Life
message:
Small improvements to make FluxBucks feel smoother.

• Settings reorganized — Look & Sound and Customize are now sub-panels
• Data Saver moved to the main settings list
• Username field expanded to 30 characters
• Star backgrounds distribute more evenly
• Profile popup has a cleaner backdrop
• How to Play updated with cloud save & friends info
• Various layout and consistency fixes
